Beans Angular LeafSpot.reason: Reduce moisture to slow bacterial spread

Beans Rust.reason: Fungal disease risk increases with moisture

Strawberry Angular LeafSpot.reason: Avoid overhead watering to limit bacterial spread

Strawberry Anthracnose Fruit Rot.reason: Reduce fruit wetness to prevent rot

Strawberry Gray Mold.reason: Botrytis spreads rapidly in wet conditions

Strawberry Leaf Spot.reason: Avoid leaf wetness to control fungal spread

Strawberry Powdery Mildew Fruit.reason: Powdery mildew thrives in humid conditions

Strawberry Powdery Mildew Leaf.reason: Reduce humidity to limit mildew progression

Tomato Blight.reason: Reduce leaf wetness to control disease

Tomato Spider Mites.reason: Spider mites thrive in dry conditions, increase watering
